- Description: Implementation plan: make dao_client compute TDG (LLM-proof contribution submissions)

  Root-caused why LLMs submit wrong TDG (the generic truesight-dao-report-contribution CLI stamps the caller's --tdg-issued verbatim, while the dapp + report_ai_agent already compute it), surveyed the Python client (build_event_cli factory, modules, rubric fn), and authored a complete paste-ready DeepSeek handoff plan: shared rubric.py (SSOT), a derive hook in build_event_cli, report_contribution recomputing TDG from Type+Amount with mismatched --tdg-issued ignored+warned (Gary's option a), report_ai_agent refactored to the shared rubric, plus tests. Corrected repo target (Python client lives inside TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol) and flagged the USDT rubric as an open decision.
